message:
Hey Emily, we noticed you completed the Circle K orientation but haven't done the background check yet. You're one step away from picking up shifts — it takes about 5 minutes in the app. Open Shiftsmart and tap "Start Background Check" to get started. Shifts are available near you once it clears.

Reply HELP if you have any questions!
